context: Tests whether the agent separates MusicKit catalog lookup from subscription-gated catalog playback and uses the current subscription offer API shape.

checklist.name: Catalog search
checklist.description: Uses MusicCatalogSearchRequest for song search and does not require an Apple Music subscription just to fetch catalog search results.

checklist.name: Application player
checklist.description: Uses ApplicationMusicPlayer.shared with queue assignment and play() for app-scoped playback.

checklist.name: Offer eligibility
checklist.description: Checks canBecomeSubscriber before presenting the Apple Music subscription offer.

checklist.name: Offer API shape
checklist.description: Uses musicSubscriptionOffer(isPresented:options:onLoadCompletion:) or accurately includes options and load-completion handling.
